hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by writing a contains() helper that checks if a character exists in a string

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use contains() to build isAlpha() — check each character against the alphabet

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use the same pattern for isNumeric() — check each character against "0123456789"

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: For isAlphanumeric(), use isAlpha() and isNumeric() together with continue to skip valid characters

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: In whatAmI(), call all three helpers and use conditionals to return the right label
